# Popover

Displays interactive floating content from a trigger.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/popover
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="popover"
  example={0}
  code={`<Popover.Root>
  <Popover.Trigger>Open popover</Popover.Trigger>
  <Popover.Content>Quick actions go here.</Popover.Content>
</Popover.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Popover.Root>
  <Popover.Trigger>Open popover</Popover.Trigger>
  <Popover.Content>Quick actions go here.</Popover.Content>
</Popover.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="popover"
  example={1}
  code={`<Popover.Root>
  <Popover.Trigger>Filters</Popover.Trigger>
  <Popover.Content side="bottom" align="start">Filter controls render below the trigger.</Popover.Content>
</Popover.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Popover.Root>
  <Popover.Trigger>Filters</Popover.Trigger>
  <Popover.Content side="bottom" align="start">
    Filter controls render below the trigger.
  </Popover.Content>
</Popover.Root>
```
